description: Query addressed to R. Yosef 'the Rav' concerning a case of inheritance. Headed by the unusual בשמ רחמ וחנינא. Involves several brothers, one minor. Quite damaged. (Information from Goitein's index cards.)
tags: legal query, Yosef Rosh ha-Seder, Responsum
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
